feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Document replication from SAP ERP into SAP Commerce CLoud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to SAP Commerce Cloud and have a question. When an order is created in SAP ERP through Commerce using CPI, is there a standard integration available to retrieve the associated order document (e.g., order PDF) back into Commerce Cloud? Additionally, is it possible to view a document flow within Commerce Cloud that includes all the relevant documents at different stages, such as order PDFs, invoice PDFs, and delivery PDFs? basically Document services? or we need custom integrations? if custom how can this be invoked and from where?

Any input here will be helpful

regards

Abdul

entry.title: 非曆年制公司, 固定資產折舊碼期間設定問題
entry.content:
請教一下各位, 

目前遇到一個問題,

集團大部分公司為曆年制, 但有兩家公司為4月制,  基於成本控制需求,  整個集團所有公司財帳皆採用曆年制(K4), 4月制公司的總帳帳套設定如下

1. 分類帳(0L) : 會計年度變式(K4) for IFRS

2. 分類帳(TL): 會計年度變式(V3) for Local Tax

3. 分類帳(2L): 會計年度變式(K4) for Asset Local Tax

Ledger Group(TL): 2L (leading Ledger), 1L

---

固定資產折舊範圍設定,  因為固定資產限制所有折舊範圍須為相同的會計年度變式,  因此以Ledger Group 方式配置.

折舊範圍(01): Transfer to 分類帳(0L) (K4)

折舊範圍(03): Transfer to 分類帳(2L) (K4) - Local Tax

在折舊範圍03,  目前雖然K4 的會計年度變式,  但相關折舊計算的基礎,  希望以4月制的概念計算折舊.

e.g. 20240701 取得資產,  希望折舊起算日為 2024/04/01 (4月制會計年度開始月份) , 

      20250301 取得資產,  希望折舊起算日為 2024/09/01 (4月制會計年度, 下半年度開始月份)

請教要如何設定固定資產折舊碼 ?

entry.title: Could Not performe a simple Excel export.
entry.content:
Dear Support : 

when we select the following informations, 

 

FBL3N - Accounts: 63000000 -73999999
Formatting /AZZAB2

we cannot export them to excel, we have this the error "XSLT: No valid xml source. ", like if the system confuse between excel and xml the moment of the export: 
we cannot export to excel with the error : invalid xml source. 

Do you have any suggestions about this issue? 

Regards,

entry.title: How to have Dynamic validity dates of Quota through TE
entry.content:
Dear All,

Can you please help me with below requirement. 

I could be able to generate first entry, but the second entry is adding the same Quota, new quota is not generating with different validity dates.

If Employee report 1003 - 8.50 hours of time on 07-10-2024 for 01-10-2024, Full day Compensatory Off (90) quota should be generated with the validity from 02.10.2024 to 01.11.2024.

If Employee report 1004 - 4.25 hours of time on 07-10-2024 for 07-10-2024, Half day Compensatory Off (90) quota should be generated with the validity from 08.10.2024 to 07.11.2024.

Thanks, Goutham.

entry.title: Steps to identify the population/list of users who are using the sap scripts in ECC System
entry.content:
Could any one please let us know the steps to identify the population users who are using the sap scripts in SAP system.

How many SAP Scripts are currently running and who created those? 

Also reg - STXH , STXL, TNAPR - how does this work for our case.

entry.title: Extend Validity of E-Waybill
entry.content:
How to extend the validity of E-Waybill?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Outbound Delivery show error msg: VL063
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help, 

The current outstanding sales quantity is 195,000, and an over-delivery tolerance of 10% has been set.

However, the delivery quantity in DN can only be assigned a maximum of 142,000. and setting the quantity to 142,001 will result in a error message VL063-Overdelivery tolerance of 10% has been exceeded.

Can anyone help?

Thanks All !!

entry.title: W2 Box 14 reporting wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES
entry.content:
When we run W2’s we found that W2 Box 14 is reporting the wrong amount for field TALO EX OT WAGES for non-Alabama employees that has overtime wages but doesn’t have wage type /PPE.

However, this is working as expected for AL employees that has OT and wage type /PPE in the results table.

entry.title: Whole quantity of a batch (false) reserved after GR
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have the following scenario happening and I don't know why this is occurring from time to time.

SAP -P08: Goods needs to be moved from plant A to plant B and an STO is created in ME21N. When goods are received and GRed in plant B, most of the time the whole quantity of a batch looks fully reserved instead of being available for end user to use it. This needs to be fixed manually every time. Any idea why this is happening and how this can be prevented?

Thank you for your support

entry.title: Selfbilling MM - Portugal error XBLNR
entry.content:
Good day,

I have an error running MRRL - Selfinvoice MM 

"FromXblnr is not in same number range as number range number XX"

1- Vendor 200172 already have "X" 

2-Create a number group S1001

3- Assign ERS Invoice Number Ranges to Company Codes

Create ERS Invoice Number Ranges

But when we we run MRRL we have these error

Can you help me?

entry.title: Not possible to retrieve information about SAP Scripting usage from directly from SAP.
entry.content:
We want to get the list of users who are using SAP Scripts since it is enabled for all user it is not possible to identify the population users who are using the sap scripts in EP7 SAP system, provide us the solution to find it. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Discrepancy between PO and SO items while adding / change in Quantities not reflecting in SO.
entry.content:
The Discrepancy between PO and SO during Creation and adding new line items / changing the quantities in the PO those are not reflecting while transferring to SO, using Output type: ZBSA in PO.

This issue occurs in the XXX (Production System), and the same behavior is observed in XXX (ECC6 Systems) and XXX (EHP8).

The discrepancies between the PO and SO are identical across all three systems.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Required Roles for SAP BW consultant to Work on SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

As a SAP BW consultant, I need to understand what roles or authorizations are typically granted to a BW consultant in SAP ECC to facilitate tasks such as:

• Extracting data using standard and custom extractors

• Accessing tables and data sources for creating data flows

• Running or debugging programs (if needed)

• Viewing configuration and function modules related to data extraction


It would be helpful if you could specify whether any specific SAP Basis roles, functional roles, or custom roles need to be requested.

Thank you in advance for your guidance!

Best regards,
Amir

entry.title: QA08 Activate despite of Stock is not creating NEW inspection lot for QI stock without lots
entry.content:
Hi Everybody,

We are moving material from Plant A of Company C1 to Plant B of Company C2 via Purchase Order.

1. When the material is received at Plant B, there should be no Inspection Lot, and the material should go to UNRESTRICTED

2. This should happen only if the supplier is Plant A

3. In case of any other vendor, the system should create Inspection Lot and move the stock to QI stock

We have made the following settings:

1. Inspection Type 01 is active for the material

2. Post to insp stock check box is checked for Inspection Type 01

3. QM proc active check box is not checked in QM view of Material Master

4. Q-Info record is maintained for material, Plant A and Plant B combination

5. In the Q-Info record Insp. controls has the value 'No Inspection'

6. GR is with reference to Inbound Delivery in VL32N.

7. We have Packing and Handling Units linked

The requirement is as follows.

1. Before implementing the above said scenario for some reason stock went to QI without lots and we need this to get transferred into unrestricted or to create valid inspection lot.

2. I expected QA08 transaction can help us in create inspection lots by using 'Activate despite of stock' option with inspection type '01', '08' or '0800'.

3. But this didn't create NEW lot for QI stocks without lots.

Is QA08 really has this functionality?

Since we are working with Inbound delivery and packing with HU, reverse posting of document is hectic.

Any work around?

 

Thanks, With Regards,

Dinesh Kumar.

entry.title: Profit center group and Dummy profit center is not visible in KCH5N
entry.content:
Hello,

I have created profit Center std. hierarchy, Dummy profit center, profit center groups and 6 profit centers. All of them were active(green) last night. But these are not visible today in KCH5N. I can see the profit centers through search button but profit center group does not pull any info getting a message " The search has not produced any hits". Noe sure what did I do wrong. Any help will be appreciated. Here is two screenshots

entry.title: Hand Over of Purchase Requisition generated from MRP not showing in MyInbox for approuval
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts, 

I'm using the handover process,  so when the PR generated from MRP, they  are checked by the planner and then once OK they are  handed over to supply team, those MRP generated PR once handed over they need to go through approuval (PR workflow of approuval via Firoi y Inbox), Im using the standard workflow and not the flixible one

The PR generated manuellay are displayed in the MyInbox, but the MRP PR once handed over, I can't find them in the INBOX, I can see the tab release strategy displayed in the PR once handed over but they dont go to the Inbox for approuver so I have to do ME54N toi approuve them

Any Help regarding this please

entry.title: Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_IMPORT/UPDATE_DBSTATS_TODIR!
entry.content:
Hi Everyone!

I'm having trouble in upgrading our system from SAP ECC 6 EHP0 to EHP8.
I am stuck in Severe error(s) occurred in phase PREP_IMPORT/UPDATE_DBSTATS_TODIR! error.

Here is the Error:

then the logs:

SAPup> Starting subprocess in phase 'UPDATE_DBSTATS_TODIR' at <ID>
*CENV: BR_ISP=1
ENV: DBMS_TYPE=ora
ENV: NLS_LANG=AMERICAN_AMERICA.UTF8
ENV: ORACLE_HOME=E:\oracle\PRD\12102
ENV: ORACLE_SID=PRD
ENV: PATHEXT=.COM;.EXE;.BAT;.CMD;.VBS;.VBE;.JS;.JSE;.WSF;.WSH;.MSC;.CPL
ENV: PATH=F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\exe;E:\oracle\PRD\12102\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\prdadm\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;D:\usr\sap\PRD\SYS\exe\uc\NTAMD64
ENV: RSEC_SSFS_DATAPATH=\\<HOST>\sapmnt\PRD\SYS\global\security\rsecssfs\data
ENV: RSEC_SSFS_KEYPATH=\\<HOST>\sapmnt\PRD\SYS\global\security\rsecssfs\key
*CENV: SAPCHECK=F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp
ENV: SAPDATA_HOME=G:\oracle\PRD
ENV: SAPSYSTEMNAME=PRD
*DBENV: dbs_ora_schema=SAPSR3
ENV: dbs_ora_tnsname=PRD
ENV: rsdb_ssfs_connect=1
*DBENV: (auth_shadow_upgrade)
PWD: F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp

EXECUTING F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\exe\brconnect.EXE -u -p F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\OPTSTAT.LST -c -f stats -f allsel,collect -p 6 -RDB
BR0801I BRCONNECT 7.40 (49)
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-25 10:39:46
BR0262I Enter database user name[/password]:
BR0805I Start of BRCONNECT processing: cfpvjioo.sta 2024-11-25 10:39:46
BR0484I BRCONNECT log file: F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\cfpvjioo.sta
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-25 10:39:53
BR0301W SQL error -1024 at location brc_dblog_open-5, SQL statement:
'INSERT INTO SAP_DBATL (SYS_ID, OPER_ID, TASKNAME, JOB_NR, UPD_OP, TLOGNAME, STATUS, BEGIN_OP, END_OP, RC, INTERNAL) VALUES ('PRD', '20241125103946', 'Update optimizer statistics', '0000000000', '20241125103953', 'F:\usr\sap\prd\sum\abap\tmp\cfpvjioo.sta', 'STARTED', '20241125103946', ' ', '0000', ' ')'
ORA-01024: invalid datatype in OCI call
BR0324W Insertion of database log header failed

BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-25 10:39:54
BR0813I Schema owners found in database PRD: SAPSR3*, SAPSR4DB
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-25 10:39:54
BR0301E SQL error -1024 at location BrIndListGet-1, SQL statement:
'OPEN curs_78 CURSOR FOR'
'SELECT OWNER, INDEX_NAME, INDEX_TYPE, TABLE_OWNER, TABLE_NAME, NVL(TABLESPACE_NAME, ' '), NVL(PARTITIONED, ' '), NVL(UNIQUENESS, ' '), NVL(COMPRESSION, ' '), NVL(PREFIX_LENGTH, 0), NVL(GENERATED, ' '), NVL(JOIN_INDEX, ' '), NVL(STATUS, ' '), NVL(LOGGING, ' '), NVL(NUM_ROWS, -1), NVL(BLEVEL, -1), NVL(LEAF_BLOCKS, -1), NVL(DISTINCT_KEYS, -1), NVL(AVG_LEAF_BLOCKS_PER_KEY, -1), NVL(AVG_DATA_BLOCKS_PER_KEY, -1), NVL(CLUSTERING_FACTOR, -1), NVL(SAMPLE_SIZE, -1), NVL(TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(LAST_ANALYZED, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')), 0), NVL(INITIAL_EXTENT, -1), NVL(NEXT_EXTENT, -1), NVL(MAX_EXTENTS, -1), NVL(DEGREE, '-1'), NVL(PCT_FREE, -1), NVL(INI_TRANS, -1), NVL(MAX_TRANS, -1), NVL(GLOBAL_STATS, ' '), NVL(TEMPORARY, ' ') FROM DBA_INDEXES WHERE OWNER = 'SAPSR3' AND INDEX_TYPE <> 'CLUSTER' AND INDEX_TYPE <> 'LOB' AND TABLE_OWNER = 'SAPSR3' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TODIR' AND TEMPORARY <> 'Y' ORDER BY OWNER, TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME'
ORA-01024: invalid datatype in OCI call

BR0806I End of BRCONNECT processing: cfpvjioo.sta 2024-11-25 10:39:54
BR0280I BRCONNECT time stamp: 2024-11-25 10:39:54
BR0804I BRCONNECT terminated with errors
SAPup> Process with PID 12460 terminated with status 3 at 20241125103954!

Is there any SAP Notes for this error?

Thanks,

entry.title: Calculation logic of moving price
entry.content:
Dear experts,

May i know if you can help to explain me what's the calculation logic of moving price when not relevant for Settlement and material Price control is 'S'？

As per my understanding, if the material which is no movement in the current period, the material's PUP should EQ to last period's PUP, meanwhile the moving price should also be equal to last period's PUP. But in my system environment, I couldn't find a logic to calculate the exact price through the law of historical prices.

Material configuration：Price control'S' & Price Determ'3'

Looking forward your kindly help.

Related t-code: CKM3&MM03

Thanks and best regards,

Charles

entry.title: SAP ECC Purchase Order Creation Automatic
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for solutions, as I am kind of stuck. I am handling some SAP ECC Optimizations and the company that I work for, requires quiet a lot of approvals for everything. Do you think that it is possible to set up somehow the transformation of Purchase Requisitions into Purchase Orders, even if they require approval? I have been reading, but cannot find a way to do it. If it is possible, once we have the Purchase Requisition approved, to send a notification to user X, based on Y criteria? 

Would love to hear the opinion of an expert.


All the best,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: IN SAP PI/PO there is soap adapter scenario (WSDL)
entry.content: There is scenario of soap adapters and in the receiver side the target wants WSDL file how to do it?
